experiences.title: Test Engineer Expert
experiences.description: Own functional, regression, validation and WCAG coverage for banking applications across mobile and desktop. Translate user stories into test scenarios, report defects in Jira/Xray and support release confidence.

experiences.title: Software Tester
experiences.description: Delivered integration, functional, regression and data validation testing for iOS and Android workflows. Built automated checks and user-facing documentation to reduce support friction and improve product reliability.

experiences.title: Full-stack Developer — Practice
experiences.description: Built and tested an e-learning platform using React, Next.js, Node.js and NestJS. Practiced code review, reliability improvements and end-to-end product thinking from a developer and QA perspective.

experiences.title: QA Coordinator
experiences.description: Coordinated mobile QA work, owned test case lifecycle in TestRail and tracked delivery in Jira. Supported estimates, planning and process improvements to keep quality visible during releases.

experiences.title: QA Engineer
experiences.description: Validated mobile and web applications through exploratory, regression and automated testing with Detox and Cypress. Maintained coverage in TestRail and helped improve repeatable release checks.

experiences.title: Technical Support Engineer
experiences.description: Supported smart home users and converted recurring issues into clear defect reports. Maintained Confluence documentation, handled Desk.com tickets and bridged customer feedback with product teams.

experiences.title: Junior IT System Engineer
experiences.description: Provided IT support for internal engineering teams, including hardware/software configuration and ticket handling in ITSM tools. Built a foundation in infrastructure, support operations and service quality.

education.title: Master of Science in Electrical Engineering
